events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened — figma design + per-surface architecture (item 1). Preflight clean, on feature branch.
Phase PRD opened after operator approved Phase 0 research exit: Approach A (close gaps B+C+D) + Gap D ships the lightweight figma-mirror-staleness advisory.
PRD approved by operator. Approach A (B+C+D) + Gap D staleness advisory; has_ui=false, requires_analytics=false; primary metric = 2/2 surfaces have current linked arch docs.
Tasks phase opened: breaking B+C+D+advisory into implementable tasks.
Task list approved (9 tasks). Phase 3 UX gateway skipped (has_ui=false).
Implementation opened. Starting T1 (iOS Figma↔code fidelity audit) + T3 (web arch doc refresh) — the two ready tasks.

T1 KILL-CRITERION TRIGGER: iOS Figma mirror (0Ai7s3fCFqR5JXDW8JvgmD) is ~0% faithful — live MCP read shows ONLY a 'Cover' page with one placeholder 'Library Overview' frame (3 text nodes). Claimed Foundations 10:3, Components 10:5, and 80-var collection 985:2 do NOT exist live (985:2 returns invalid node). Rebuild plan lines 64-67 mark Phase A '✅ verified live via screenshots' — this is FALSE; live file matches the plan's OWN line-21 'before/empty' diagnosis. Fresh FT2-FH-005-class false-provenance claim in the remediation doc itself. PRD kill criterion (<50% fidelity → STOP + re-scope) fired. Halting before T2-T9; escalating to operator.

RETRACTION of T1 kill-criterion finding. Authoritative use_figma plugin-API read (fileKey 0Ai7s3fCFqR5JXDW8JvgmD) shows the iOS mirror is COMPREHENSIVE: 28 pages, 198 vars across 8 collections incl. 80-var 'code mirror' 985:2 (values match tokens.json exactly), Components 10:5 with 18 component-sets in FULL variant matrices, Foundations 10:3, 22 text styles, 2 effect styles. The earlier '0% / empty Cover only' reading came from get_metadata/get_variable_defs/get_design_context reflecting the Figma DESKTOP APP context (stale Cover-only view), NOT the fileKey-addressed file. Kill criterion did NOT trigger. Rebuild cancelled before any write (no Figma mutation performed). Reverting to original Approach A. Real residual gap: code-mirror vars have empty codeSyntax. New observed-pattern candidate W38 (desktop-context vs fileKey read divergence).
